entities.description: As a subsection of '3.3 热成像图', this section provides the thermal imaging results of the industrial-grade core board under different operating conditions, including temperature measurement points and their corresponding thermal distribution.
Refers to the industrial-grade core board being analyzed in this section, which is part of the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board hardware manual.
Refers to the thermal imaging technique used to visualize temperature distribution on the core board, as described in section 3.3.1.
Refers to the specific points on the thermal image where temperatures are measured, including the highest temperature point (red) and the center temperature point (white).

relations.description: The concept of '工业级核心板' is the primary subject of section 3.3.1.
The concept of '热成像' is the primary method used in section 3.3.1.
The concept of '温度测量点' is a key element analyzed in section 3.3.1.
